---
title: "05_species_meta_regression"
format: html
---

# Setup
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, here, brms, tidybayes, cmdstanr, emmeans, arrow, rio, janitor, ape)

```

# Load models and data
```{r}
# load linpred draws
spp_lss_draws = read_parquet(here("size_bd_unified", "intermediates", "unified_03_b_spp_lss_draws.parquet"))

# load life history
ls_in = read_csv(here("size_bd_unified", "intermediates", "iucn_habitat_metrics.csv"))

ls_clean = ls_in %>%
  mutate(log_habitat_breadth = log(habitat_breadth))

# phylogenetic tree
jp_phylo_tree = read.tree(here("size_bd_unified", "intermediates", "phylo_tree.nwk"))
jp_phylo_cov = ape::vcv.phylo(jp_phylo_tree, corr = FALSE)

```

# visualize metrics
```{r}
ggplot(spp_lss_draws, aes(x = hu)) +
  geom_histogram()

ggplot(spp_lss_draws, aes(x = sigma)) +
  geom_histogram()


```

# calculate metrics
```{r}
spp_lss_agg = spp_lss_draws %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture, life_stage_simple) %>%
  summarise(hu_lss_mean = mean(hu),
            mu_lss_mean = mean(mu),
            sigma_lss_mean = mean(sigma),
            hu_lss_sd = sd(hu),
            mu_lss_sd = sd(mu),
            sigma_lss_sd = sd(sigma),
            .groups = "drop")

spp_agg = spp_lss_agg %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture) %>%
  summarise(hu_mean = mean(hu_lss_mean),
            hu_sd = mean(hu_lss_sd),
            sigma_mean = mean(sigma_lss_mean),
            sigma_sd = mean(sigma_lss_sd))

spp_contrast_agg = spp_lss_draws %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("taxon_capture", ".draw"),
              names_from = "life_stage_simple",
              values_from = c("hu", "mu", "sigma")) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "subadult - adult",
         hu_contrast = hu_subadult - hu_adult,
         mu_contrast = mu_subadult - mu_adult) %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture) %>%
  summarise(contrast = dplyr::first(contrast),
            hu_contrast_mean = mean(hu_contrast),
            hu_contrast_sd = sd(hu_contrast),
            mu_contrast_mean = mean(mu_contrast),
            mu_contrast_sd = sd(mu_contrast),
            .groups = "drop")

metrics_agg = spp_agg %>%
  left_join(spp_contrast_agg, by = "taxon_capture")

metrics_ls = metrics_agg %>%
  left_join(ls_clean, by = "taxon_capture")

```

# checks
```{r}
# Names in your covariance matrix
mat_names = rownames(jp_phylo_cov)

# Names in your data
data_names = unique(metrics_ls$taxon_capture)

# Check for mismatches
setdiff(data_names, mat_names)  # in data but not matrix
setdiff(mat_names, data_names)  # in matrix but not data
```

# Model
```{r}
set_cmdstan_path(Sys.getenv("cmd_stan_path"))

m1_lspr = brm(
  mvbf(
    hu_mean | mi(hu_sd) ~ habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    hu_contrast_mean | mi(hu_contrast_sd) ~ habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    mu_contrast_mean | mi(mu_contrast_sd)  ~ habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    sigma_mean | mi(sigma_sd) ~ habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A))
  ),
  data  = metrics_ls,
  data2 = list(A = jp_phylo_cov),
  # control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 15),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 2000,
  seed = 124,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m1_lspr = add_criterion(m1_lspr, "loo")

saveRDS(m1_lspr, file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1_lspr.rds"))
m1_lspr = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1_lspr.rds"))

m1b_lspr = brm(
  mvbf(
    hu_mean | mi(hu_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    hu_contrast_mean | mi(hu_contrast_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    mu_contrast_mean | mi(mu_contrast_sd)  ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
    sigma_mean | mi(sigma_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A))
  ),
  data  = metrics_ls,
  data2 = list(A = jp_phylo_cov),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 2000,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m1b_lspr = add_criterion(m1b_lspr, "loo")

saveRDS(m1b_lspr, file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1b_lspr.rds"))
m1b_lspr = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1b_lspr.rds"))

# lognormal for sigma
m1c_lspr = brm(
  mvbf(
    bf(hu_mean | mi(hu_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
       family = gaussian()),
    bf(hu_contrast_mean | mi(hu_contrast_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
       family = gaussian()),
    bf(mu_contrast_mean | mi(mu_contrast_sd)  ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
       family = gaussian()),
    bf(sigma_mean | mi(sigma_sd) ~ log_habitat_breadth + aquatic_index + (1 | p | gr(taxon_capture, cov = A)),
       family = lognormal())
  ),
  data  = metrics_ls,
  data2 = list(A = jp_phylo_cov),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 2000,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m1c_lspr = add_criterion(m1c_lspr, "loo")

saveRDS(m1c_lspr, file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1c_lspr.rds"))
m1c_lspr = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/meta_model_m1c_lspr.rds"))

```

# model comparison
```{r}
(loo_comp_out = loo_compare(m1_lspr,
                            m1b_lspr))

bayes_R2(m1b_lspr)
```

# model evaluation
```{r}
model_select = m1b_lspr
summary(model_select)
plot((model_select), ask = FALSE)
plot(conditional_effects(model_select), ask = FALSE)
VarCorr(m1_lspr)
hyp <- paste("sd_taxon_capture__Intercept^2 /",
             "(sd_taxon_capture__Intercept^2 + sigma^2) = 0")
hypothesis(m1_lspr, hyp, class = NULL)

hyp_hu = paste("sd_taxon_capture__humean_Intercept^2 /",
             "(sd_taxon_capture__humean_Intercept^2 + sigma_humean^2) = 0")
hyp_mu_contrast = paste("sd_taxon_capture__mucontrastmean_Intercept^2 /",
             "(sd_taxon_capture__mucontrastmean_Intercept^2 + sigma_mucontrastmean^2) = 0")
hyp_hu_contrast = paste("sd_taxon_capture__hucontrastmean_Intercept^2 /",
             "(sd_taxon_capture__hucontrastmean_Intercept^2 + sigma_hucontrastmean^2) = 0")
hyp_sigma = paste("sd_taxon_capture__sigmamean_Intercept^2 /",
             "(sd_taxon_capture__sigmamean_Intercept^2 + sigma_sigmamean^2) = 0")

ht_hu_contrast = hypothesis(m1b_lspr, hyp_hu_contrast, class = NULL)
ht_mu_contrast = hypothesis(m1b_lspr, hyp_mu_contrast, class = NULL)
ht_hu = hypothesis(m1b_lspr, hyp_hu, class = NULL)
ht_sigma = hypothesis(m1b_lspr, hyp_sigma, class = NULL)

ht_hu_contrast
ht_mu_contrast
ht_hu
ht_sigma
```
# ppcheck
```{r}
pp_check(model_select,
         resp = "humean",
         type = "dens_overlay",
         prefix = "ppc",
         ndraws = 100) +
  scale_x_log10()

pp_check(model_select,
         resp = "hucontrastmean",
         type = "dens_overlay",
         prefix = "ppc",
         ndraws = 100) +
  scale_x_log10()

pp_check(model_select,
         resp = "mucontrastmean",
         type = "dens_overlay",
         prefix = "ppc",
         ndraws = 100) +
  scale_x_log10()

pp_check(model_select,
         resp = "sigmamean",
         type = "dens_overlay",
         prefix = "ppc",
         ndraws = 100) +
  scale_x_log10()

```

# visualize
```{r}
fit_mv %>%
  gather_draws(`b_.*`, regex = TRUE) %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", .variable)) %>%
  separate(.variable, into = c("prefix", "response", "term"),
           sep = "_", extra = "merge") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = .value, y = term, color = response, fill = response)) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.6, .width = c(0.5, 0.89)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate", y = NULL,
       title = "Fixed effects across responses")
```

# explore specific groups
```{r}
# Example: IUCN category effect on hu_mean
iucn_grid <- expand_grid(
    iucn_redlist_category = unique(meta_summary$iucn_redlist_category),
    development_stage     = "larval",          # hold constant
    pop_trend_present     = "stable",                # hold at reference
    max_svl_mm            = median(meta_summary$max_svl_mm)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hu_sd             = 0.01,
    hu_subadult_sd    = 0.01,
    b_subadult_sd     = 0.01,
    sigma_sd          = 0.01
  )

# re_formula = NA marginalizes over phylogenetic RE
iucn_draws <- iucn_grid %>%
  add_epred_draws(fit_mv,
                  re_formula = NA,
                  resp = "husubadultmean")

iucn_draws %>%
  group_by(iucn_redlist_category) %>%
  median_qi(.epred, .width = c(0.5, 0.89)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = iucn_redlist_category, y = .epred,
             ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper)) +
  geom_pointrange() +
  theme_classic()


```
